name: Arabian Nights
collationMethod: striped, 11x11 sheets; common sheet + uncommon sheet

draft.notes: 8-card booster: 6 from the common sheet, 2 from the uncommon sheet. No rare slot. Packs can be front- or back-facing; uncommons may come before or after commons. Pre-foil era.

statedRates: no separate rares; rarity derived from sheet print frequency (C1/C4/C5/C11 on common sheet, U1/U3 etc. on uncommon sheet)
sourceNotes: Small set, 78 cards. Two print sheets only (common + uncommon); there is no distinct rare rarity. Page gives no clean common/uncommon totals (cards classed by print frequency), so composition counts left null. Printed Belgium. 60 packs per box.
